items.title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
items.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

items.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
items.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

items.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
items.summary: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 高市早苗強化中東危機外交  調停角色受關注
items.summary: 伊朗情勢持續升溫，日本首相高市早苗近日加大首腦外交力道，橫跨亞洲、中東與歐洲密集互動，試圖運用日本長年累積的國際關係提升影響力。不過，面對外界期待日本在美伊之間扮演更積極調停角色，政府仍顯審...…

items.title: 以軍證實士兵擊打黎巴嫩耶穌雕像 外長稱必受嚴懲
items.summary: 以軍今（20）日表示，已確認社群媒體上流傳的1張照片屬實，照片顯示1名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部擊打耶穌雕像。  根據《法新社》報導，照片中的以色列士兵用大錘擊打1尊從十字架上...…

items.title: 南韓廣藏市場再傳宰客爭議！1瓶水將近市價2倍
items.summary: 南韓首爾廣藏市場是許多觀光客都會到訪的地方，但宰客爭議不斷，近來有在南韓生活13年的緬甸裔YTR徐藝恩（서예은，音譯），帶著俄羅斯朋友一起去市場，孰料攤販1瓶500毫升的水賣到將...…
